    Faster SLA reduces support-related drop-offs.

    Prediction Settings

    AI Classification Boundaries

    Modify the threshold boundaries that separate Low, Medium, and High churn risk states. Setting these boundaries adjusts dashboard labels in real-time.

    75%
    Customers scoring above this limit trigger critical notifications.
    50%
    Defines the boundary between stable accounts and warning-tier accounts.

    Mitigation Triggers

    Configure webhooks and notifications that dispatch alerts when a customer enters the High-Risk category.

    Automated Outreach Draft

    Generate draft email templates for account managers when scores hit high risk.

    Slack Alert Dispatch

    Post customer warnings automatically into the #customer-success channel.

    Integrations Healthcheck

    Trigger automatic backend webhook healthcheck checks if API volume drops 20%.
